entities.girl: a girl with a ponytail looking puzzled

scenes.title: The Library
scenes.background_prompt: A quiet library with tall wooden bookshelves filled with books, a reading table with a green lamp, a round wall clock showing 4 PM, and soft natural light from tall windows. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A quiet library with tall wooden bookshelves lining every wall, packed with books of various colors and sizes. A girl with dark hair pulled into a ponytail sits at a wooden reading table in the center. An open book lies in front of her, and she stares at the pages with a deeply puzzled expression — eyebrows knitted together, one hand on her cheek, her lips pressed in thought. She looks confused and uncertain, as if she cannot understand what she is reading. At another table nearby, a second student — a boy in a green sweater — sits reading a thick book calmly, absorbed in his reading. A round wall clock above the main bookshelf shows 4 PM. A green banker's lamp glows softly on the girl's table. Warm natural light streams through tall arched windows on the right wall, casting long golden rectangles on the wooden floor.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl at the reading table (center), sitting with open book in front of her, staring at pages with deeply puzzled expression, eyebrows knitted, one hand on cheek. Place student at another table nearby, sitting and reading calmly, absorbed.
scenes.scene_description: In the lower left foreground, a girl with curly brown hair sits cross-legged on a light blue and white patterned rug. She is wearing a yellow and blue horizontal-striped sweater, green trousers, and brown shoes, and she smiles while holding an open book with a picture on the left page. To her right, a wooden table sits on the wooden floor where a second girl, a student, is seated on a wooden chair. This student has brown hair tied in a ponytail with a red tie, wears a green long-sleeved shirt under yellow overalls and brown boots, and looks grumpy as she rests her chin on her left hand over an open book. To the right of the student is an empty wooden chair, and a green banker's-style desk lamp with a gold base sits on the table. In the bottom right corner, small white flowers and green clover grow from the floor. Behind the characters, four tall wooden bookshelves filled with numerous colorful books in shades of blue, green, red, and yellow line the wall. On top of the leftmost bookshelf is a round green bush in a brown terracotta pot. Above the second bookshelf from the left, a round white clock with a brown frame indicates it is ten o'clock. On top of the fourth bookshelf is a leafy green plant in a brown terracotta pot, and another small potted green bush sits on a ledge behind the student. To the right of the bookshelves, two large arched windows with brown frames reveal a background of green leafy trees under a light blue sky with fluffy white clouds. The room has light beige walls and a polished wooden floor.

S: light blue and white patterned rug
IE: sitting down at the wooden table
finding a quiet place to study
P: trying to complete a difficult task
A: resting her chin on her hand
staring at the pages of a book
CO: struggling to focus on the lesson
filling the room with quiet study

ENP: small white flowers and green clover
